title: Trump taps Zuckerberg, Andreessen and Huang for tech council
description: President Donald Trump appointed technology industry titans to a new presidential technology council that will focus on artificial intelligence policy and other science-related issues.
content:
By Courtney Subramanian, Bloomberg

title: India's AI Leadership: Transforming the Future
description: Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw led a meeting discussing India's advancements in artificial intelligence, emerging technologies, and electronics manufacturing. The meeting highlighted substantial expansion in electronics exports and the AI sector's growing impact across multiple fields, with emphasis on self-reliance through initiatives like the IndiaAI Sovereign Stack.

title: India’s interactive media market at inflection point as monetisation gains pace
description: India's interactive media market is now worth $14 billion. The focus has shifted from gaining users to making money. Cheap data, smartphones, and UPI are key. Consumers are spending more on digital experiences. New content formats are growing fast. Gaming and animation are strong areas. Artificial intelligence is changing content creation and distribution.

title: Kanye West Affiliate Defends "Bully" Amid Harsh Reaction To Leaks
description: Fans aren't happy that Kanye West appears to have been using artificial intelligence to craft his upcoming album, "Bully."
content: Kanye West affiliate Joseph Karre promises that fans will have much more positive thoughts on Bully once they hear the official version on Friday, March 27. He shared the prediction on X (formerly Twitter) on Tuesday. "Timeline gonna look a lot diffe... [1422 chars]

title: OpenAI pulls the plug on Sora, the viral AI video app that sparked deepfake concerns
description: SAN FRANCISCO — OpenAI is shutting down its social media app Sora, which went viral last fall as a place to share short-form videos generated by artificial intelligence but also raised alarms in Hollywood and elsewhere.
content:
SAN FRANCISCO — OpenAI is shutting down its social media app Sora, which went viral last fall as a place to share short-form videos generated by artificial intelligence but also raised alarms in Hollywood and elsewhere.

title: How the Iran war could split the AI boom in two
description: The Iran war has laid bare a paradox: Gulf money is helping underwrite America's effort to win the artificial intelligence (AI) race, and now the United States has started a conflict that could destabilise those investments.

title: How AI Is Creeping Into The New York Times
description: Artificial intelligence seems to be turning up, undisclosed, in the opinion pages of major news publications.
content: On Sunday, a writer named Becky Tuch posted an excerpt on X from a months-old New York Times “Modern Love”column that had given her pause. “I don’t want to falsely accuse writers” of using AI, she wrote. “But this reads EXACTLY like AI slop.” The exc... [9533 chars]

title: AI fears prompt Gen-Z to drop out of college, shift to blue collar industries
description: Gen Z is rethinking college and rushing into blue-collar work as fears mount that artificial intelligence will wipe out white-collar jobs -- with nearly three out of five young adults now viewing AI as a threat.
content: Gen Z is rethinking college and rushing into blue-collar work as fears mount that artificial intelligence will wipe out white-collar jobs — with nearly three out of five young adults now viewing AI as a threat to their careers, according to a recent ... [2930 chars]
